title: Red Grass
description: A resource pack that changes grass color to red!
body:
The "Red Grass" resource pack for Minecraft transforms the game's natural landscape by changing the standard green grass blocks to a striking red color, offering a fresh and vibrant look to your Minecraft world. The pack is designed to "spice up your world" with its unique visual style, making it ideal for players looking for a bold and unconventional aesthetic.

And who doesn't love the color red ^-^
